title: Crispy Fatty Brazilian Gherkin Delight Bites
description: A date-night recipe featuring crispy fried wontons, a gherkin relish, and a mortar-pestle-pound mustard made with sunflower seeds and spices. Ayurvedic and tamasic-friendly for a decadent treat.
instructions: Grind the sunflower seeds with the garlic in a mortar-pestle until you get a smooth paste.
Add the chopped onion and gherkin to the mortar-pestle, pound until well combined.
Add salt and black pepper to the mortar-pestle, mix well.
Mix the Greek yogurt with the mustard made in the mortar-pestle, set aside.
Cut the wonton wrappers into squares, place a small spoonful of the yogurt-mustard mix in the center of each square.
Dip your finger in water and run it along the edges of the wonton wrapper, fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the wonton.
Heat about 1-2 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
Fry the wontons in batches until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the fried wontons on paper towels, serve hot with the gherkin relish on top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, serve immediately.
